subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enamoured of the celestial Beloved! Thy detailed letter was perused; it contained novel meanings and delightsome themes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سودائی دلبر آسمانی نامه مفصل ملاحظه گردید معانی بدیع داشت و مضامین دلنشین
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
